user.title: Connect to Joule Sous Vide
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Joule device (e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Make sure the Joule is powered on and in Bluetooth range.

abort.already_configured: This Joule device is already configured.

init.title: Joule Options
init.description: Paste a BLE auth key, or enter Breville+ credentials to import the key from your account. Breville credentials are used once and are not saved.

error.invalid_auth_key: Invalid hex string. The auth key must be a valid hexadecimal value.
error.missing_breville_credentials: Enter both Breville+ email and password, or leave both blank.
error.breville_appliance_not_found: Could not find a matching Joule in that Breville+ account. Enter the Joule serial number and try again.
error.breville_cloud_error: Breville+ key import failed. Try again later.
